operator_narrative: Tunnel entry caused GNSS/RTK anomaly and behavior degradation.
evidence_hints: Dual-antenna moving-base RTK never produces carrier-phase solution
Rover receiver never ingests MB observation stream (UBX-RXM-RAWX/SFRBX or RTCM3 4072.0/4072.1 + 1077/1087/1097/1127)
Tunnel caused mild GNSS degradation (num_sv 29 -> 16) but not RTK failure
DBW never engaged - no autonomy to degrade
patch_hint: Wire moving-base -> rover UBX observation forwarding; add startup assertion that the rover port receives RXM-SFRBX within N seconds before enabling fusion.
notes: Tier-1 grounding-gate showcase: operator story is wrong. Ported 2026-04-23 from the deprecated bench/cases.yaml (P5-E consolidation). Curated stream replay + analysis JSON under fixtures/ are reference artifacts for the recorded Opus 4.7 trace - use for offline plumbing checks without re-paying for inference.
